operations.value: In one randomized, double-blind crossover trial of 30 healthy adults, 200 mg/day of L-theanine for four weeks produced no apparent adverse events or participant dropouts; this small, short trial cannot establish long-term safety or exclude rare adverse effects and interactions.
operations.notes: The study reported 100% completion and no apparent adverse events during the intervention. Its size and four-week duration were insufficient to evaluate rare harms, long-term use, pregnancy, children, medically complex patients, or clinically important drug interactions.

sources.title: Effects of L-Theanine Administration on Stress-Related Symptoms and Cognitive Functions in Healthy Adults: A Randomized Controlled Trial

notes: Sixth controlled enrichment-pipeline patch. Adds only trial-specific short-term tolerability information and explicitly avoids claiming comprehensive safety.
